findings.area: agenda row — lørdag 11. juli, 23:00 Norway – England (Kvartfinale)
findings.issue: The 'Norway – England' Kvartfinale fixture at 23:00 is shown as two identical, back-to-back accented rows (same time, same teams, same round, same 'TV 2' channel) directly under the Wimbledon damefinale row. Reads as a duplicate event, not two different matches.

findings.area: agenda row — lørdag 11. juli, 23:00 Norway – England (Kvartfinale)
findings.issue: Same duplicate 'Norway – England' 23:00 Kvartfinale row appears twice, confirming this is not a 375px-only rendering artifact.

findings.area: agenda row — lørdag 11. juli, 23:00 Norway – England (Kvartfinale)
findings.issue: Duplicate row confirmed again at desktop width — two stacked accented rows, identical content, for the same 23:00 fixture.

findings.area: agenda rows — fredag 10. juli 21:00 and søndag 12. juli 03:00, 'Round of 16 ... Winner' fixtures
findings.issue: At 900px the placeholder bracket text ('Round of 16 5 Winner – Round of 16 6 Winner' / 'Round of 16 7 Winner – Round of 16 8 Winner') is clipped mid-word with an ellipsis ('...Wi...'), even though the identical text wraps onto a second line and shows in full at 375/393px. Low severity since the content is a generic placeholder, not a real team/athlete name, but it is width-dependent truncation worth a look.

notes: No horizontal scroll or edge clipping at 375px; layout holds as a single quiet column with generous spacing at all three widths.
Norwegian-channel contract holds: only NRK, TV 2, TV 2 Play, Viaplay, Max and the honest '–' placeholder appear — no foreign broadcaster (ESPN/FOX/Sky) seen at any width.
Tentative-channel styling ('NRK / TV 2' in italics) renders consistently for not-yet-confirmed knockout fixtures — reads as intentionally provisional, not a bug.
Flags and sport icons render correctly everywhere — no broken image icons or empty boxes.
Round labels (Åttedelsfinale, Kvartfinale) display correctly next to knockout fixtures at all widths.
Header, day-group headings, 'Hva vi følger' disclosure, and footer (Oppdatert / Legg til i kalender / AI-budsjett line) are intact and aligned at every width.
Must-see accent (orange left border + shaded background) is used sparingly — applied to Sjakk-NM, Genesis Scottish Open, the Norway – England fixture(s), and Swiss Open Gstaad, not to every row.

Team names read in full at 375/393px, including the fixtures flagged as truncated in a prior review (United States – Belgium, Switzerland – Colombia) — no truncation of team/athlete names observed today.
